title: Butter Dog
description: The dog with the butter on him
body:
# Butter dog


This ressource pack turns all wolves into butter dogs by adding butter on their heads (works on all dog variants)

It needs Optifine or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to work properly

![A butter dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zWfQ0lUQ/images/1a660397dac2a90be1d14a85fa21e589f0a1906a.png)
